song.title: Your Christ My Hope
song.lyrics: [V1] 1) I’m thankful that God has placed me With you to build up His Body. Christ in you is the hope for me! You also need Christ lived in me. [C] I live, if you stand firm in the Lord. You live, if I stand firm in the Lord. My going on is for you, Your going on is for me, Not sep’rate entities, I need you saints desp’rately! [V2] 2) Oh, what a sweet church life have we! Built up in Him, His bride to be! In Him steadfast, you help me be; Encouraged by Christ whom I see. [V3] 3) Your faith in Christ helps me pursue; My progress depends upon you! As I seek Christ, with you in view, My heart, full of prayers, is for you. [V4] 4) God’s heart longs, desires that we, His lovers, seek Him corp’rately. On each other spent constantly; My life is for you, yours for me. [V5] 5) I want to encourage you all, Without your supply I would fall. Never think that your Christ is small. Christ needs you, and so do we all.
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C
